message:
fix(tests): repair 3 localStorage.test.ts failures from PR 9369 (#9375)

The 3 "returns false when ... throws" tests in localStorage.test.ts
were calling vi.spyOn(Storage.prototype, ...), but src/test/setup.ts
replaces window.localStorage with a plain object literal that does
not inherit from Storage.prototype. The spy never intercepted the
mock instance's methods, so the safe* helpers ran normally and
returned true instead of catching a thrown error and returning false.

Spy directly on the window.localStorage instance instead, which
matches how the test setup actually installs the mock.

Fixes Issue 9372.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
